历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the lowest science ranking was approximately 16905, in 2023 approximately 14158, and in 2025 the lowest physics category ranking was approximately 26637 (first choice physics, no further subject restrictions). Rankings fluctuated significantly over the past three years, with a clear forward shift in 2023 compared to 2022 (increased competition), but a large backward shift in 2025 due to the new college entrance examination subject grouping, with a baseline ranking of approximately 26637. The university's enrollment plan in Sichuan for science/physics category: 101 in 2022, 101 in 2023, 118 in 2025, and 117 in 2026. 2026 shows a slight reduction of about 0.85% compared to 2025, with a minor impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 84th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable range of 75-84 in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of science and engineering institutions. No significant negative public opinion incidents have been observed in recent reputation monitoring. The comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is not in the top 100, with average attention on short video platforms, and no records of enrollment gaps. Electrical Engineering is rated A (top nationally), Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics rated A-, with distinctive characteristics in the electric power industry, strongly attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the popularity of Electrical Engineering and Automation is 'highly recommended', Energy and Power Engineering is 'recommended', and Computer Science remains relatively hot. The total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Sichuan in 2026 is approximately 535,000, a significant increase from 2025, with physics category candidates estimated at about 326,000 (up about 14% from 285,000 in 2025), leading to markedly intensified competition. The university is located in Baoding, Hebei Province, not within Sichuan, so there is no local enrollment preference. The university's enrollment proportion in Sichuan is about 2-4%, which is a regular cross-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 26637, the slight reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (0.85%), and the significant increase of about 14% in physics category candidates in Sichuan, competitive pressure has clearly risen. The continued high popularity of the top electrical majors further boosts application enthusiasm. The predicted lowest ranking for 2026 is approximately 26802, with a range of 26302-27302.

The admission ranking for Electrical Engineering and Automation has consistently been at the top (approximately 10898 in 2025), far above the predicted range, so careful evaluation is needed.
